seo_title: NR vs NMN for Women Over 40: What Clinical Studies Actually Show (2026)
meta_description: TruNiagen claims NR beats NMN, but what does the head-to-head data actually say? We analyze the clinical evidence for both NAD+ precursors for women over 40, including women-specific trial data.
